questions.q: Momentum is defined as:
questions.answer: Mass times velocity

questions.q: In an elastic collision between two objects:
options: Momentum is conserved but kinetic energy is not
Both momentum and kinetic energy are conserved
questions.answer: Both momentum and kinetic energy are conserved
